transcript:
CALLER: Hi, my husband had an appendix operation at your clinic four days back and he's been having some swelling near the wound. I'm not sure if it's normal or not.
AGENT: I understand that must be worrying. What's the patient's name?
CALLER: Deepak Joshi.
AGENT: Ms. Joshi, post-operative wound queries really need to be assessed by the treating surgeon or our nursing staff, as I wouldn't be in a position to advise medically on this. I don't want to give you incorrect information about something this sensitive. Let me transfer you to our post-operative care team right away — they'll be able to tell you if this requires attention.
CALLER: Yes please, I've been worried since morning.
AGENT: Completely understandable. Connecting you now to our ward staff. Please hold the line.
